system.powerDescription:
With a jolt, you transform two objects with a total of CAT size between them into magnets. Choose one of the following effects to apply to them: 

•ATTRACT: The two objects are drawn towards one another at CAT speed and become incredibly difficult to separate. 

•REPEL: The two objects are repelled away from another at CAT speed up to a short distance apart and become nigh-impossible to keep together. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may easily alter the parameters of a roll whilst active.
